pageContext.name: Sonic the Hedgehog (Collector Edition)
pageContext.description: Sideshow and First 4 Figures are excited to present the Sonic the Hedgehog (Collector Edition) Statue!  This highly detailed Sonic PVC statue is seen striking a dynamic pose, revving up to run faster than the speed of sound. The base design is inspired by the Green Hill Zone, and on it is also the Star Post checkpoint, which you can rotate up to 90 degrees, allowing for multiple viewing angles.   The statue is housed in a beautifully designed collector's box, which can also turn and double as a diorama backdrop for added visual aesthetics. The Collector Edition of this statue comes with the Star Circle and bright LED functions for both the checkpoint bulb and the Star Circle.  Add this statue to your collection at supersonic speeds!
